summary: ANDROID 🟥 Correct Firmware version for Charge Case but Update available on Software tab after DFU
feature: Android App - Device Settings / Software Tab
scenario: After DFU update on Charge Case, Software tab shows Update button with same build number and tapping it causes immediate DFU failure; correct version appears only after app restart.
description_clean: After performing a DFU update on the Charge Case, the Software tab still shows an Update button with the same build number, even though the correct firmware version is displayed. Tapping the Update button causes DFU to fail immediately. The correct version only appears after restarting the app.
steps: Perform a DFU update on the Charge Case.
Observe that the Software tab still shows an Update button with the same build number.
Note that the correct firmware version is displayed.
Observe that the correct version now appears.
expected: After the DFU update, the Software tab should show the correct firmware version and not display an Update button with the old build number. Tapping Update should not cause an immediate failure.
actual: After the DFU update, the Software tab still shows an Update button with the same build number, even though the correct firmware version is displayed. Tapping Update causes DFU to fail immediately. The correct version only appears after restarting the app.
